message:
Add comprehensive test tasks for all 15 NTM improvement epics

- Added 30 test tasks total (2 per epic):
  * Unit test tasks with detailed coverage requirements
  * E2E test tasks with workflow scenarios and logging specs
  * 3 error handling test tasks for recovery scenarios

- Added 1 Master Integration Test task that exercises all 15 features

- Added intra-epic dependencies:
  * E2E tests depend on Unit tests completing first
  * Error handling tests depend on E2E tests
  * Master Integration Test depends on all 15 E2E tests

- All test tasks include:
  * Specific test coverage requirements
  * Logging format specifications
  * Test data/fixture requirements
  * Mock/integration requirements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
